RCamelsPE 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting started with RCamelsPE
  • Changelog

Read CAMELS-PE Station Metadata

Source: R/metadata.R
read_metadata.Rd

Reads the station metadata table from the CAMELS-PE dataset. This file contains the main information for each gauging station and catchment, including identifiers, station names, geographic coordinates, hydrographic regions, observation periods, nested catchment information, and other available metadata fields depending on the CAMELS-PE dataset version.

read_metadata(path = get_camels_path())

Arguments

path

Character string. Optional path to the CAMELS-PE root directory. If not provided, the path previously defined with set_camels_path() is used.

Value

A tibble with CAMELS-PE station metadata.

Details

The function reads the file:

01_metadata/stations.csv

from the CAMELS-PE root directory.

Use read_dictionary() to inspect available metadata fields, descriptions, units, and data sources.

Examples

path <- system.file(
  "extdata",
  "sample_camels_pe",
  package = "RCamelsPE"
)

# Inspect available metadata variables
read_dictionary(
  category = "metadata",
  path = path
)
#> # A tibble: 15 × 7
#>    folder      file         category variable           description unit  source
#>    <chr>       <chr>        <chr>    <chr>              <chr>       <chr> <chr> 
#>  1 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_id           "Catchment… -     SENAM…
#>  2 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_name         "Gauge nam… -     SENAM…
#>  3 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_region       "Hydrograp… -     SENAM…
#>  4 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_lat          "Gauge lat… degN  SENAM…
#>  5 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_lon          "Gauge lon… degE  SENAM…
#>  6 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_elev         "Gauge ele… m_asl SENAM…
#>  7 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_record_start "Start dat… -     SENAM…
#>  8 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_record_end   "End date … -     SENAM…
#>  9 01_metadata stations.csv metadata gauge_perc_obs     "Percentag… %     Deriv…
#> 10 01_metadata stations.csv metadata name_cat           "Official … -     ANA   
#> 11 01_metadata stations.csv metadata is_nested          "Indicates… logi… Deriv…
#> 12 01_metadata stations.csv metadata nested_group_id    "Gauge ide… -     Deriv…
#> 13 01_metadata stations.csv metadata nested_group_size  "Number of… -     Deriv…
#> 14 01_metadata stations.csv metadata downstream_gauge_… "Gauge ide… -     Deriv…
#> 15 01_metadata stations.csv metadata upstream_gauge_id  "Gauge ide… NA    Deriv…

# Read station metadata
stations <- read_metadata(path = path)

# Preview the first rows
head(stations)
#> # A tibble: 2 × 15
#>   gauge_id  gauge_name gauge_region gauge_lat gauge_lon gauge_elev
#>   <chr>     <chr>      <chr>            <dbl>     <dbl>      <dbl>
#> 1 PE_212900 La Capilla Pacific         -12.5      -76.5        423
#> 2 PE_200907 Racarumi   Pacific          -6.63     -79.3        265
#> # ℹ 9 more variables: gauge_record_start <date>, gauge_record_end <date>,
#> #   gauge_perc_obs <dbl>, name_cat <chr>, is_nested <lgl>,
#> #   nested_group_id <chr>, nested_group_size <dbl>, downstream_gauge_id <chr>,
#> #   upstream_gauge_id <chr>
